source: Gmyrek et al. (2025), ILO Working Paper 140
role: Occupation-level generative AI exposure scores over ISCO-08 occupations.
license_or_terms: ILO repository source page lists CC BY 4.0; ILO post-2023 open-access publication terms apply, with third-party material exclusions where relevant.
source_detail: Task-level score_2025 values aggregated to ISCO-08 4-digit and 2-digit occupations.
redistribution_status: Derived ISCO-08 2-digit and national aggregate exposure tables are redistributed; original source workbook/PDF is not redistributed.

role: Country employment by sex and ISCO occupation; wage and labor-share inputs where available.
license_or_terms: ILOSTAT aggregate data and accompanying metadata are covered by the ILO post-2023 CC BY 4.0 data policy, excluding restricted microdata; cite ILOSTAT.
version_or_release: Most recent country-year observations available in local analysis snapshot.
source_detail: ISCO-08 2-digit employment by sex and occupation; ISCO wage and labor share indicators.
redistribution_status: Derived occupational-share, national, wage-weighted, and labor-share aggregates are redistributed; raw ILOSTAT snapshots and restricted microdata are not redistributed.

role: GNI per capita PPP, population, income groups, regions, remittance totals, and remittance share of GDP.
license_or_terms: World Bank Data Catalog/DataBank terms apply: CC BY 4.0 unless dataset or indicator metadata states otherwise; attribution to the World Bank and data providers required.
version_or_release: FY26 income/region classifications; WDI indicators accessed for 2024 where available.
source_detail: GNI PPP, population, BX.TRF.PWKR.DT.GD.ZS, BX.TRF.PWKR.CD.DT, country groups.
redistribution_status: Derived paper-facing tables and selected provider-reported aggregate indicators are redistributed; raw API/bulk-download mirrors are not redistributed.

source: World Bank / KNOMAD bilateral remittance matrix
role: Bilateral source-country shares for remittance inflows.
license_or_terms: World Bank/KNOMAD Data Catalog/DataBank terms apply: CC BY 4.0 unless dataset metadata states otherwise; attribution and World Bank mandatory dataset terms apply.
version_or_release: WB.KNOMAD.BRE, latest bilateral matrix year used: 2021
source_detail: Bilateral Remittance Estimates using migrant stocks, host-country incomes, and origin-country incomes.
redistribution_status: Derived remittance-weighted exposure tables and selected aggregate corridor evidence are redistributed; the full raw bilateral matrix workbook is not redistributed.

role: Published aggregate country usage and task-composition statistics.
license_or_terms: Anthropic Economic Index data are released under CC-BY; associated code is released under MIT.
version_or_release: Economic Index country usage release used in paper analysis snapshot.
source_detail: Country-level Claude usage per working-age population.

role: Published country ranks for per-capita ChatGPT usage.
license_or_terms: OpenAI Signals data are licensed under CC BY 4.0.
version_or_release: OpenAI Signals country-rank release used in paper analysis snapshot.
source_detail: Country rank percentile for per-capita ChatGPT use.

role: Published cross-country generative AI adoption measures.
license_or_terms: Published report/table terms apply; users should consult Microsoft source terms before downstream reuse of the project-authored extraction.
version_or_release: H2 2025 generative AI adoption measure used in paper analysis snapshot.
source_detail: Cross-country generative AI adoption as share of working-age population, extracted from the public report table.
redistribution_status: Project-authored country-level extraction is redistributed for website replication and validation plots; raw report PDF is not redistributed.

role: Task and occupational property data used for robustness and mechanism checks.
license_or_terms: O*NET 30.2 Database is used under CC BY 4.0 attribution terms.
source_detail: Contains information derived from the O*NET 30.2 Database by the U.S. Department of Labor, Employment and Training Administration (USDOL/ETA), modified through SOC-to-ISCO crosswalks and national aggregation. USDOL/ETA has not approved, endorsed, or tested these modifications.
redistribution_status: Derived national mechanism variables only; raw database files not redistributed.

role: Alternative occupational exposure measure used in robustness comparisons.
license_or_terms: OpenAI GPTs-are-GPTs GitHub repository data/code are MIT licensed; Science article and arXiv preprint are cited for the paper.
version_or_release: OpenAI GPTs-are-GPTs repository data used in local snapshot.
source_detail: LLM-task exposure measure crosswalked from SOC/O*NET to ISCO for robustness comparisons.
redistribution_status: Derived ISCO-level and national comparison tables are redistributed; raw repository files are not redistributed.

role: Alternative occupational exposure measure referenced in robustness comparisons.
license_or_terms: SSRN paper/supplement terms apply; no standalone open-data redistribution license identified.
version_or_release: SSRN 2026 paper/supplement used in local snapshot.
source_detail: Occupational AI exposure share crosswalked from SOC/O*NET to ISCO for robustness comparisons.
redistribution_status: Aggregate robustness statistics and source links only; transformed ISCO-level and national H&L score vectors are not redistributed because open-data redistribution permission has not been verified.
